userAgreement.title: User Agreement
userAgreement.section1-1: 1.1. By using the Website, the User confirms that they are familiar with and agree to the terms of this Agreement.
userAgreement.section1-2: 1.2. If the User does not agree to the terms of the Agreement, they must immediately stop using the Website.
userAgreement.section1-3: 1.3. The Website is for informational purposes only and is not an online store, e-commerce platform, or paid service.
userAgreement.section2-1: 2.1. The Website provides information about events, galleries, projects, and products of Antares Investment.
userAgreement.section2-2: 2.2. All data (including text, images, catalogs, project descriptions) are for free viewing and do not constitute a public offer.
userAgreement.section2-3: 2.3. Prices and online payment through the Website are not provided.
userAgreement.section3-1: 3.1. The Website contains a feedback form intended for collecting messages and inquiries from Users.
userAgreement.section3-2: 3.2. By submitting a message, the User agrees to transmit the entered data to the Company and its processing in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
userAgreement.section4-1: 4.1. When using the feedback form, the User voluntarily provides personal data (e.g., name, email, phone number).
userAgreement.section4-2: 4.2. All personal data is processed in accordance with the Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan "On Personal Data."
userAgreement.section4-3: 4.3. The Company agrees to use the data only for contacting the User and not to share it with third parties without legal grounds.
userAgreement.section5-1: 5.1. All materials on the Website, including texts, images, logos, design elements, and the Website structure, are the intellectual property of Antares Investment LLC or are used legally.
userAgreement.section5-2: 5.2. Copying, distribution, and commercial or public use without written consent of the copyright holder is prohibited.
userAgreement.section6-1-list1: view any information posted on the Website;
userAgreement.section6-1-list2: use the feedback form to send messages.
userAgreement.section6-2-list1: attempting to damage, hack, or otherwise disrupt the Website;
userAgreement.section6-2-list2: posting spam or malicious data via the feedback form.
userAgreement.section6-3: 6.3. The Company is not responsible for temporary interruptions, data loss, or possible technical errors.
userAgreement.section7-1: 7.1. This Agreement may be amended without prior notice. The current version is always available on the Website.
userAgreement.section7-2: 7.2. Continued use of the Website after changes implies automatic acceptance of the new version.
userAgreement.section7-3: 7.3. All disputes are resolved under the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
userAgreement.section7-4: 7.4. The Website is owned by Antares Investment LLC, registered in the Republic of Uzbekistan.
